zh.lifeSummary: 當Inge Stenkilsson於大約1049年出生在瑞典烏普薩拉時，他的父親Stenkil Ragnvaldsson King of Sweden25歲，母親Ingamoder Emundsdotter26歲。他和Helena, Queen of Sweden至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於大約1110年在瑞典維亞斯特格特藍德享年63歲。

zh-hans.Västergötland, Sweden: 瑞典維亞斯特格特藍德

zh-hans.Uppsala, Stockholm, Sweden: 瑞典斯托可霍爾姆烏普薩拉
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Inge Stenkilsson于大约1049年出生在瑞典烏普薩拉时，他的父亲Stenkil Ragnvaldsson King of Sweden25岁，母亲Ingamoder Emundsdotter26岁。他和Helena, Queen of Sweden至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于大约1110年在瑞典維亞斯特格特藍德享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Inge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ingeborg   or   Ingetraud .

variants.name: Inga
meanings: Respelling of the German and Scandinavian name Inge, a short form of Ingrid or any of various other names (for example Ingeborg) based on the name of the old Germanic fertility god Ing.

historicEvents.title: Vreta Abbey is First Christian Convent
historicEvents.description: Vreta Abbey was established around 1100 and was the first Christian convent in Sweden. It was located in modern-day Linkoping Municipality. It was founded on orders of Pope Paschal II with large donations by King Inge the Elder and Queen Helena.

en.lifeSummary: When Inge Stenkilsson was born about 1049, in Uppsala, Sweden, his father, Stenkil Ragnvaldsson King of Sweden, was 25 and his mother, Ingamoder Emundsdotter, was 26. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Helena, Queen of Sweden. He died about 1110, in Västergötland, Sweden, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Inge Stenkilsson est né environ 1049, à Uppsala, Suède, son père, Stenkil Ragnvaldsson King of Sweden, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ingamoder Emundsdotter, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Helena, Queen of Sweden. Il est décédé environ 1110, à Västergötland, Suède, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Inge Stenkilsson um 1049 in Uppsala, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stenkil Ragnvaldsson King of Sweden 25 und seine Mutter Ingamoder Emundsdotter 26. Er hatte mit Helena, Queen of Sweden mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1110 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Västergötland, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Inge Stenkilsson è nato il circa 1049 nel Uppsala, Svezia, il suo padre, Stenkil Ragnvaldsson King of Sweden, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Ingamoder Emundsdotter, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Helena, Queen of Sweden. Morì circa 1110, nel Västergötland, Svezia, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.Västergötland, Sweden: スウェーデンvaステルグoトランド

ja.lifeSummary: Inge Stenkilssonが約1049年にスウェーデンウップサラで生まれた時，父Stenkil Ragnvaldsson King of Swedenは25歳，母Ingamoder Emundsdotterは26歳であった。彼はHelena, Queen of Swedenとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1110年にスウェーデンvaステルグoトランドで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Inge Stenkilsson(이)가 대략 1049년 스웨덴 업프사라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stenkil Ragnvaldsson King of Sweden(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ingamoder Emundsdotter(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Helena, Queen of Sweden(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1110년 스웨덴 브a스터그o틀랜드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1049–about 1110: tany ho any amin'ny 1049–tany ho any amin'ny 1110

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Inge Stenkilsson nasceu aproximadamente 1049, em Uppsala, Suécia, seu pai, Stenkil Ragnvaldsson King of Sweden, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ingamoder Emundsdotter, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Helena, Queen of Sweden. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1110, em Västergötland, Suécia, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Inge Stenkilsson родился около 1049 г. в местности уппсала, Швеция, его отцу по имени Stenkil Ragnvaldsson King of Sweden было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ingamoder Emundsdotter, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Helena, Queen of Sweden. Он умер около 1110 г. в местности вaстиргoтланд, Швеция в возрасте 63 лет.

sm.about 1049–about 1110: e tusa o le 1049–e tusa o le 1110

sm.from 1080 to 1084: mai le 1080 e o'o I le 1084

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Inge Stenkilsson nació aproximadamente 1049, en Uppsala, Suecia, su papá, Stenkil Ragnvaldsson King of Sweden, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Ingamoder Emundsdotter, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Helena, Queen of Sweden. Murió aproximadamente 1110, en Västergötland, Suecia, a la edad de 63 años.
